home.hero_sub_1: We help businesses transform opportunities into sustainable growth through market intelligence, product strategy, and cross-border expansion expertise.
home.hero_sub_2: With deep understanding of Indonesia and China markets, we assist companies in validating opportunities, developing market-fit products, and executing growth strategies that drive measurable business outcomes.
home.trust_cap: Trusted by Chinese businesses scaling in Indonesia
home.help_title_1: Three ways in - wherever you are on the
home.help_sub: Whether you're scoping the Indonesian market, building your local team, or scaling distribution - our work meets you where you are.
home.help_card1_desc: Transform data into actionable insights through market research to identify opportunities, reduce risks, and support informed business decisions.
home.help_card2_desc: Develop effective growth strategies, market entry plans, and business solutions tailored to your objectives, helping transform opportunities into sustainable business success.
home.help_card3_desc: Empowering professionals and organizations with practical expertise, strategic capabilities, and market knowledge to thrive in an evolving business landscape.
home.what_sub: Expanding into new markets requires more than insight alone. It demands trusted connections, local expertise, and proven experience. We combine these strengths to help organizations navigate complexity, seize opportunities, and achieve sustainable growth across Indonesia and China.
home.macro_stat_cap: China-Indonesia bilateral trade, and continuing to climb. Figure pending verification - latest Kemendag / China Customs data.
home.macro_desc_1: Trade between China and Indonesia crossed USD 130 billion in recent years - and continues to climb. Yet most Chinese companies entering Indonesia either underestimate the regulatory complexity, the cultural nuance, or both.
home.macro_desc_2: 8vice was built precisely for this corridor.
home.why_r1_desc: Our extensive network across government institutions, industry stakeholders, and business communities helps clients access critical market insights, navigate regulations, and build strategic partnerships that accelerate growth.
home.why_r2_desc: With deep expertise in both Indonesian and Chinese markets, we help businesses overcome cultural, regulatory, and commercial barriers to achieve successful cross-border expansion and market entry.
home.why_r3_desc: Our diverse pool of specialists combines experience in strategy, market research, business development, operations, finance, and public affairs, delivering comprehensive solutions tailored to each business need.
home.why_r4_desc: Our recommendations are shaped by hands-on experience across industries and markets, ensuring practical strategies that have been tested, refined, and proven to deliver measurable results.
home.case_sub: A selection of the businesses we've helped land, scale, and adapt in Indonesia.
home.case_note_1: Detailed, named case studies are in production with client permission.
home.app_desc_1: Most firms either generalize - advice you've heard before - or hyper-specialize, handing you a piece of the puzzle, not the puzzle.
home.app_desc_2: We assemble a small, senior advisor team around your specific situation, drawing from a network of operators who've spent decades inside the industries we serve.
home.app_p1_desc: Advisors who have actually built and run businesses in Indonesia - not consultants reading from a deck.
home.app_p2_desc: You get the operator best suited to your problem, not whoever happens to be on the bench.
home.app_p3_desc: Project-based engagements sized to the decision in front of you - from diagnostic to embedded advisory.
home.app_p4_desc: Every engagement is built to create measurable progress you can take to your board.
home.vid_sub: A 3-minute film on why we operate the way we do.
home.ins_title_1: Stay ahead of the trends with our latest
home.sub_desc: Monthly insights for Chinese executives operating in Indonesia.
home.cta_title_1: Have an Indonesia move on the
home.cta_desc: Tell us where you're going. We'll respond within two business days with an honest read on whether we can help.
